title: Specklinia adirii
taxonomy: Specklinia adirii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is classified within the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Epidendreae. Specklinia adirii is a member of the genus Specklinia and is native to Ecuador. The species is often found in the Andes mountains at high elevations. Further taxonomic classification may be available in specific botanical resources.

intro: Specklinia adirii is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been studied for its potential health benefits, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may aid in wound healing and the management of respiratory issues such as bronchitis.
